steps.title: Follow the dyeing sequence
steps.content: The passage describes a process in order: soak the sumac, add the cloth, simmer it for hours or days, and then remove the cloth. The transition should show that the final action happens after time has passed.

steps.title: Use a time transition
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, Choice B signals similarity, and Choice D signals restatement. None fits the last step of a chronological process after a long simmer. The answer is C.
